ddls:
CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was reported */,
  "cumulative_total" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of testing data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was reported */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "testing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "daily_total" INTEGER /* Daily total of tests conducted */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases reported on the given date */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date when the test results were available */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level or reliability score for the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_testing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_type_id") REFERENCES testing_types ("testing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital or a central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital or a central point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government, health organization, research institute) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_types" (
  "testing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing type */,
  "testing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the testing type */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Average accuracy rate of the testing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
